statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1155 — Brocard's problem n ∈ [191, 210] Lean 4 extension
  ==============================================================

  Follow-up to STEP 1154 (n ∈ [171, 190]). Same Nat.sqrt-based O(log) approach.

  Target: n ∈ [191, 210] non-square verification (20 new theorems).
  Combined with prior STEPs (980/990/993/1015/1016/1017/1018/1044/1154/Brocard base):
    Rei-AIOS Brocard coverage n ∈ [1, 210] (~221 theorems total).

  Honest positioning:
    - Berndt-Galway 2000: N ≤ 10⁹ (Brocard's problem search limit).
    - Rei contribution: Lean 4 mechanical verification first record continues.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
